description: The ``Global Transform`` node outputs the position, rotation and scale of the input slot in global coordinate space, i.e. the slot's transform relative to the world root slot.

fields.* ([[Slot]]): The slot whose global transform is output.
fields.Position: The global position of the provided * (Slot).
fields.Rotation: The global rotation of the provided * (Slot).
fields.Scale: The global scale of the provided * (Slot).
